title: Plant Basket With Liner, Indoor Woven Plant Pots for 11" Planter Flower Pots Cotton Rope Jute Plant Pot Decoration Foldable Laundry Basket Household Storage Basket
features: 【PLANT BASKET WITH LINER】Cotton cord woven, healthy and durable, chemical free woven basket, each size, each colour is configured with a plastic liner, cotton cord pot cover is suitable for decorating indoor living room, kitchen, balcony, providing a great visual decorative effect. (flower pots/plant saucers/plants not included)

【BEST FOR 11'' PLANTER】Approximate size is 11" dia x 11" h. Ideal for home potting, fits cylindrical pots 9" to 10" in diameter. Particularly suitable for violin leaf fig trees, indoor burgundy rubber tree plants, large cacti, aloe vera, monstera or snake plants.

【FOLDABLE WOVEN PLANT POTS】Our durable cotton rope basket is as soft as cloth but as strong as a wire or wicker rattan design. Designed with firm handles for easy movement and taking away, the baskets have a flat bottom and a rounded shape. When not in use, it can be folded flat for easy storage and space saving.

【MULTI-PURPOSE STORAGE BASKET】Sturdy &soft quality, not only can be used as a flower pot cover, but also as a dirty clothes basket, toy storage basket and so on. The material of the basket is soft and will not cause any scratches on the floor when moved.

【WASHING TIPS】We recommend hand washing, but you can also use your washing machine if it is placed in a garment bag or pillowcase, air drying is better, or you can dry it on a delicate cycle (note: the basket is folded when transported, when you fill it with some towels or blankets it will quickly change back to its elegant shape, an iron is a good idea).

It is very suitable for large plants, such as turtle back plants, cacti, sisal and other plants in large pots, adding warm colors to the entire bedroom. Jute Plant Pot enrich your life,Decorate flower pots, add color to simple flower pots, add green and beauty to the living space, increase happiness and reduce anxiety, and bring a relaxed atmosphere to busy urban life.
